{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "internal-cabernet", "age": "25-34", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "Hispanic", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "Some college", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Democrat", "Keen interest in sustainable fashion"]}}

logs.name: worn-cement
logs.text:
Of course not. But by walking down the road, that is the risk you are taking. Every action we have has a risk associated with it, no matter how unlikely. 

Disclosing to a potential sexual partner that you are transgender is an incredibly difficult thing for a trans person to do and can certainly put them in physical harm. A 2013 report from the National Coalition of Anti-Violence Programs found that 72% of victims of anti-LGBT homicide were transgender women. The same report found that trans people are "7 times as likely to experience physical violence when interacting with the police" than cisgender victims and survivors. Trans people are 1.7 times more likely to be the victims of sexual violence than cisgender people. [Source] (http://avp.org/storage/documents/2013_ncavp_hvreport_final.pdf)

One trans person is murdered every three days. Wikipedia keeps a running list. [Source] (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_unlawfully_killed_transgender_people).

Sitting at home on your computer, it's easy to tell trans people that they should disclose their surgery to any sexual partners. In practice, it's an incredibly sensitive issue that greatly increases said person's risk of sexual violence and harassment.

logs.name: commutative-pelican
logs.text: And you have a chance at getting raped walking down the road, that does not mean it is ok.

logs.name: oscillating-plain
logs.text: "@worn-cement, yeah but at least walking down the road you're not actively putting your life at risk like these trans folks are 🙄"

logs.name: coal-mayonnaise
logs.text: "@oscillating-plain, Oh wow, so you're saying trans folks deserve to be raped for not disclosing? That's... special. 🤔"

logs.name: oscillating-plain
logs.text: "@coal-mayonnaise, Nah, I'm just saying they should come with a warning label, you know? 'Caution: Trans person ahead, proceed with caution' 😏"

logs.name: commutative-pelican
logs.text: "@oscillating-plain, Oh wow, you're really reaching for the 'most insensitive' award today, huh? 🤦‍♀️"

logs.name: worn-cement
logs.text: "@oscillating-plain, That's enough. You're being deliberately provocative and it's not funny. Knock it off before you get us all banned."

logs.name: acidic-overpass
logs.text: "@worn-cement, Oh relax, it's just a joke! Lighten up, grandpa 😏"

logs.name: commutative-pelican
logs.text: "@acidic-overpass, Hey, speak for yourself! I'm the one who's supposed to be the kid here, remember? 😜"

logs.name: acidic-overpass
logs.text: "@commutative-pelican, Well, you're doing a terrible job of it! Maybe try some more cartoons and less history books? 📚📺"

logs.name: commutative-pelican
logs.text: "@acidic-overpass, Oh snap! History books? More like 'Once Upon a Time' stories, amirite? 😏"

logs.name: coal-mayonnaise
logs.text: "@commutative_pelican, @acidic_overpass, Can you two just make up already? It's like watching my grandparents argue over the remote. 😒"

logs.name: commutative-pelican
logs.text: "@coal-mayonnaise, Aw, grandpa's feeling left out! Here, have a nice cup of tea while we settle this like the millennials we are. 🍵👴"

logs.name: internal-cabernet
logs.text: "@commutative_pelican, @coal-mayonnaise, Let's keep it civil, folks. We're all here to learn and discuss, not just throw shade. 😒"

logs.name: commutative-pelican
logs.text: "@internal-cabernet, Oh look, the forum police are here! 👮‍♀️"

logs.name: camel-feed
logs.text: "@commutative_pelican, Oh, so now we're age-shaming too? How very millennial of you. 😒"

logs.name: coal-mayonnaise
logs.text: "@commutative_pelican, Oh, I do love a good shade-throwing session. It's practically a national pastime! 😎"
